issues_found: Minor: The speech explicitly includes disclaimer that 'views are my own, and not necessarily those of the Federal Reserve Bank of New York, the Federal Reserve System, or any other organization.' The why_it_matters field frames this as 'the authoritative New York Fed perspective,' which slightly overstates the institutional nature of these remarks.

corrected_fields.why_it_matters: This speech provides the New York Fed SOMA Manager's perspective on the transition away from quantitative tightening and into the ample reserves framework. Understanding the Fed's operational framework is essential for money market participants, as the shift affects repo rates, federal funds dynamics, and the distribution of reserves across the banking system. Note: Perli clarifies these are his own views, not necessarily those of the Federal Reserve Bank of New York or the FOMC.
